series_metadata.series_description: File contains invoice and letter requesting payment for money owed to the Bureau of Underground Storage Tank Regulations (BUSTR).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 4 years, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain for 4 years, then destroy. ; Microform: Retain for 4 years, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete ; Microform: Shred
